1510000001.korean: 하 씨… 내일부터 핫팩 얼굴 어떻게 보고 다니냐…
1510000001.english: Ha… how are you going to walk around with a hot pack on your face starting tomorrow?

1510000002.korean: 야. 어제부터 숙소에 박혀서 아무 말도 안 하고. 뭔 일 있어?
1510000002.english: Hey. You've been holed up in the dorm since yesterday, not saying a word. What's up?

1510000003.korean: 이 언니가 생각할 일이 있어서 그래. 신경 꺼.
1510000003.english: I just have something on my mind, sis. Mind your own business.

1510000004.korean: 지랄. 누가 언니래? 대가리에 총이라도 맞았나.
1510000004.english: What the hell. Who's calling me sis? Did someone shoot you in the head or something?

1510000005.korean: 장화 이모~ 같이 옷 보러 가자니까? 왜 갑자기 다른 길로 새?
1510000005.english: Aunt JangHwa~ I said let's go shop for clothes together, why did you suddenly take a different route?

1510000006.korean: 야. 내가 그딴 호칭으로 부르지 말랬지.
1510000006.english: Hey. I told you not to call me that.

1510000007.korean: 에이, 처음에 불렀을 땐 아무 말도 못했으면서.
1510000007.english: Gee, you couldn't even say anything when I first called you that.

1510000008.english: Red must be thrilled to have a niece now~

1510000009.english: Ugh… this girl is really something…

1510000011.korean:
근데, 장화 너. 진짜 많이 변했네. 
옛날엔 내가 건물 빠져 나오든 말든 기폭장치부터 먼저 당겼잖아.
1510000011.english: But JangHwa, you've really changed a lot. Back in the day, whether I got out of a building or not, I’d pull the detonator first.

1510000012.english: If you miss it, want me to do it again?

1510000013.korean: 그럼 네 조카님께서 얼마나 슬퍼하시겠어? 이모가 이렇게 착하고 순해졌는데.
1510000013.english: Then how sad your niece would be? Auntie's become so nice and gentle.

1510000014.korean: 하… 이년이 성질 긁는 거 봐라?
1510000014.english: Ha… look at this girl getting all worked up.

1510000015.korean: 근데 천아 언니 그제 사령관 앞에서 애교 부렸다면서? 사령관이 기겁했다던데?
1510000015.english: But CheonA sis, didn't you act cute in front of the Commander the other day? I heard the Commander got startled.

1510000017.korean: 너한테 맞지도 않는 짓거리를 하니 그렇지. 애초부터 네가 애교 떠는 애였냐?
1510000017.english: That's because you're doing things that don't suit you. Were you always the cute‑acting type?

1510000018.english: You look pleased about finally scoring a kill after a while?

1510000019.korean: 천아 언니~ 그러지 말고, 옷 보러 갈 건데. 언니도 같이 갈래?
1510000019.english: CheonA sis~ Stop that, I'm going shopping. Want to come along?

1510000020.english: Huh? Why would I go there?

1510000021.korean:
히힝, 언니. 언니도 사실 사령관한테 잘 보이고 싶은 마음에 그랬던 거 아냐? 
으흠… 난 언니보다 먼저 사령관을 만나서 잘 아는데~
1510000021.english: Heehee, sis. You did it because you wanted to look good in front of the Commander too, right? Ahem… I actually met the Commander before you, so I know him well~

1510000023.korean: 이모, 언니! 이거 어때? 나한테 어울려?
1510000023.english: Auntie, sis! How about this? Does it suit me?

1510000024.korean: 아씨, 진짜 나한테 팔짱 끼지 마.
1510000024.english: Ugh, seriously, don't cross your arms at me.

1510000025.korean: 미호 너한테 어울리긴 하겠네. 빨강이 너는 따로 옷 안 사?
1510000025.english: Miho, I guess it does suit you. Red, aren't you buying any clothes for yourself?

1510000026.english: …Fine. It just takes up closet space anyway. Too lazy to tidy up.

1510000027.korean: 이모, 이거 입어 봐. 이모한테 딱 어울리는 옷이야. 어때?
1510000027.english: Auntie, try this on. It's perfect for you. How's it look?

1510000028.english: Do you think that would suit me?

1510000029.korean: 응? 이 옷이 왜 안 어울려? 이모 카페에서 알바할 땐 아예 고양이 귀 머리띠하고 야옹~ 하잖…으브븝?!
1510000029.english: Huh? Why wouldn't this suit me? When Auntie worked at the cafe, you wore a cat‑ear headband and went “meow~”…ugh?

1510000031.korean: 생각해보니 핫팩이 꽤 좋아할 거 같은데? 가끔은 이런 단정한 스웨터에 청바지도 괜찮을 것 같네.
1510000031.english: You know, I think she'd really like a hand warmer. And sometimes a tidy sweater with jeans could work.

1510000032.korean: 평범하지 않아? 노출도 좀 적고… 걔는 좀 더 언니 만큼…
1510000032.english: It's not that flashy, right? Not much skin shown… she should be more like her older sister.

1510000033.korean: 이모도 노출만 하지 말고 다른 모습을 보여줘야 사령관이 더 좋아하지.
1510000033.english: Auntie, you need to show more than just skin if you want the commander to like you more.

1510000034.english: …Hmm, now that you mention it, maybe that's true. Could it really be like that?

1510000035.korean: 음침하게 폭탄 든 자켓만 입고 다니는 것보단 낫지.
1510000035.english: It's better than constantly wearing that gloomy, bomb‑laden jacket.

1510000036.korean: 너야말로 흰색 패딩에 핫팩만 끼고 다니잖아. 괜히 안 어울리는 애교 부리지 말고 옷이나 바꿔.
1510000036.english: You're the one always in a white puffer with a hand warmer. Stop forcing that unfitting cuteness and just change your outfit.

1510000037.korean: 누가 보면 맨날 이 옷만 입고 다니는 줄 알겠…
1510000037.english: Anyone looking would think I wear this same thing every day…

1510000038.korean: 솔직히, 천아 언니 처음 봤을 때부터 지금까지 저 옷 아니었어?
1510000038.english: Honestly, haven't you been in that same outfit since I first saw you, CheonA?

1510000041.korean: 야, 나도 그래서 좀 바꾸려고 하잖아! 이래 봬도 원피스나 드레스 같은 거 생각하고 있다고!
1510000041.english: Hey, that's why I'm trying to switch things up! Believe it or not, I've been thinking about dresses and one‑pieces!

1510000043.korean: 근데, 내가 볼 땐 천아 언니는 저런 화려한 옷보단 언니 이미지에 맞는 옷이 더 좋을 거 같은데?
1510000043.english: But, in my eyes, CheonA, you'd suit outfits that fit your big‑sister vibe better than flashy clothes.

1510000045.korean: 자빠뜨리는 건 잘하면서 왜 안 어울리는 거만 하려고 그래.
1510000045.english: You're great at being goofy, so why are you trying to look out of place?

1510000046.korean: 아, 이거 어때? 이모. 이거 천아 언니한테 잘 어울리지~ 그렇지?
1510000046.english: Hey, what about this? Auntie. This would suit CheonA perfectly, right?

1510000048.korean: 야, 이건… 진짜 이게 나랑 어울린다고 생각하냐?
1510000048.english: Hey, do you really think this actually matches me?

1510000049.korean: 아니면 원피스 입고 혀 짧은 소리만 계속 내던가. 아, 애초부터 혀가 갈라져서 발음이 새려나.
1510000049.english: Or you could just keep wearing a dress and making that short‑tongue noise. Ah, maybe your tongue's split from the start, so your pronunciation is sharp.

1510000050.korean: 이모는 진짜 말을 해도… 흐흠, 내가 보기엔 언니는 이게 훨씬 더 어울릴 것 같아.
1510000050.english: Even if you try to argue, Auntie… hmm, I think this would suit you far better.

1510000051.korean: 으음… 좀 요란한 것 같기도 하고… 뭐랄까, 이런걸 입어도 핫팩은 날 여자로 봐줄까?
1510000051.english: Hmm… it's a bit gaudy… I wonder, if I wear something like this, will the hand warmer still think of me as a girl?

1510000052.korean: 처음 만났을 때부터 욕 박아버렸으면서 무슨 귀여운 척이야. 머리가 있으면 생각을 해라.
1510000052.english: You’ve been hurling insults since day one, now you’re trying to act cute. Think with that brain of yours.

1510000054.korean: 천아 언니. 일단 한 번 입어보는 거 어때? 사령관이 좋아할 거 같은데.
1510000054.english: CheonA, why not just try it on? I think the commander will like it.

1510000056.english: Put it on and show us.

1510000057.english: That brat’s really being a drama queen.

1510000058.korean: 그러고보니 천아 언니가 저러는 거 진짜 이상하긴 해. 맨날 여유 넘치는 줄 알았는데.
1510000058.english: Now that I think about it, CheonA’s behavior is really weird. I always thought she was always so relaxed.

1510000059.korean: 꼴에 자기도 여자라, 첫 데이트 준비하고 싶은 거고. 나한테 별 지랄은 다했으면서.
1510000059.english: She’s a woman too, wants to prepare for a first date. She’s made me do all kinds…

1510000060.korean: 이모 진짜 많이 바뀐 거 같아.
1510000060.english: Aunt… really seems to have changed a lot.

1510000061.english: What are you trying to say now?

1510000062.korean: 처음에 이모~ 라고 팀원들이 불렀을 땐 노발대발했잖아.
1510000062.english: When the team first started calling me “Auntie~,” I was freaking out.

1510000063.korean: 오글거리잖아… 그 가족놀이에 날 끼진 말라고.
1510000063.english: It’s so cringe… Don’t drag me into that family act.

1510000064.korean: 이모가 쓰는 표현은 퉁명스러워도, 천아 언니 많이 신경 써주는 게 느껴져서 좋은 거 같아.
1510000064.english: Even if Auntie’s wording is blunt, I can feel CheonA really caring, and that’s nice.

1510000065.english: Stop the crap. It’s seriously cringe.

1510000070.english: That’s so you. It suits you.

1510000071.english: Is that all the praise you have?

1510000072.korean: 언니. 진짜 괜찮은데? 나 사복으로 이런 느낌 내는 건 천아 언니가 처음이야…
1510000072.english: Sis, you really look great. It’s the first time I’ve seen you pull off this casual vibe, CheonA…

1510000073.korean: 좀 그렇지 않아 보여? 튀는 느낌에다가 크게 특별해 보이지도 않고...
1510000073.english: Doesn’t it seem a little off? It’s flashy but not that special…

1510000076.korean: 네 방식대로 오르카에 들어왔으면 네 스타일대로 행동해.
1510000076.english: Since you joined Orca on your own terms, act according to your own style.

1510000080.korean: 야~ 어이가 없네, 빨강이. 네가 언제부터 내 신경 써줬다고...
1510000080.english: Hey~ This is absurd, Red. Since when did you start looking out for me…

1510000081.english: Should I just stop caring about you forever?

1510000082.english: …No, thank you. I’ll take your word today.
